northStar.name: The Local Operations Console
northStar.summary: A calm desktop control surface for local service operations, maintenance, and recommended updates.

headline.purpose: Used for page and panel titles in the desktop shell.

body.purpose: Used for descriptions, helper text, and maintenance guidance.

label.purpose: Used for metadata, card labels, and small utility text.

motion.reducedMotion: Decorative animation should collapse to nearly static behavior when prefers-reduced-motion is enabled.

dos: Keep operational state above secondary content.
Use a single blue accent for selection and primary action.
Maintain visible focus states and compact desktop spacing.
donts: Do not make the dashboard feel like a marketing site.
Do not use large-area glass surfaces or neon glow.
Do not let visual effects outrank readability or task efficiency.
